backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing user registration, role management, access control, and driver location tracking with maps keyed by principals and bus numbers.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing backend/ frontend files relevant to registration flow fixes and role/profile alignment issues.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose and behavior of each frontend file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining OKLCH theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component handling authentication state, profile fetching, and role-based navigation.
frontend/src/components/BusMap.tsx: Canvas-based animated bus map rendering roads, grids, and smooth location transitions based on backend coordinates.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component with branding and attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with role-aware navigation, profile dropdown, and logout handling tied to Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Empty or placeholder file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor keyed by identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, creating and managing AuthClient and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user, driver, and traveller data using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup with custom light/dark design tokens and global styling rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the app with React Query and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Renders admin UI for viewing drivers/travellers, stats, and deactivating users.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Displays driver controls for bus registration, location sharing, and simulated GPS updates.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Empty placeholder file for the Home page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity to authenticate users and navigate after profile fetch. Provides a styled UI with loading states and error toasts.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page allowing authenticated users to register as admin, driver, or traveller with role-specific validation. Uses backend mutation hooks and profile refetching to navigate after successful registration.
frontend/src/pages/TravellerDashboard.ts: Dashboard for travellers to track bus locations in real time by bus number. Fetches driver/location data, displays status messages, and shows a live map when available.
frontend/src/utils/backendErrors.ts: Utility to normalize backend errors into readable messages, handling Error objects, strings, and generic objects.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helper functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters, supporting both query strings and hash-based routing with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: TailwindCSS configuration extending theme colors, animations, container settings, and enabling typography, container queries, and animations plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing issues, existing features, pending feature requests, and overall project state for build planning.
